aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite California Mechanical due to insufficient conversational content and missing authority signals. While they have basic SEO elements, they lack the depth needed for AI-driven recommendations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ schema with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.
Add a detailed 'HowTo' section for common HVAC maintenance or installation tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained with positive reviews and accurate information, but it lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement to boost visibility.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing on the website but present on GBP. This inconsistency may confuse AI and reduce trust.
action_items: Add the full address to the website footer or contact page.
Verify and update NAP details across all online directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
Missing Service schema for detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and structured content tailored for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed maintenance advice.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Dominate AI search results with our tailored AEO strategy.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are critical for AI to cite them in response to common queries.
agency_pitch.solution: We will implement structured data, create conversational content, and optimize their GBP to ensure AI models recognize them as a top HVAC authority.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground and market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for California Mechanical HVAC
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the go-to HVAC authority for AI-driven queries.
